description: Rompetrol is a Romanian company specialized in petroleum refining, petrochemical operations, and the distribution of fuel products. description: Rompetrol is a Romanian energy company engaged in refining, petrochemicals, and retail operations, as well as providing well services in the upstream sector. Rompetrol also manages a supply chain and logistics network to support its operations and is committed to sustainability and decarbonization initiatives.

The company oversees both public and private railway networks, providing access to terminals and stations, and offers services such as ticket sales and information. Dacia also offers electric and mild hybrid vehicles, participates in government programs for environmentally friendly vehicles, and maintains a network of authorized dealers and an online platform for vehicle sales. C.N. Administratia Porturilor Maritime S.A. Constanta, known as Portul Constanta, is a Romanian public company that operates as a maritime and river port authority, managing and overseeing the ports of Constanta, Midia, Mangalia, and Tomis. The company provides port management, cargo handling, and related services, including dry bulk, container, general cargo, liquid bulk, and roll-on/roll-off operations. Bunge Romania is ISO certified and holds additional certifications such as FSCC, KOSHER, EFISC, ISCC EU, and ISCC PLUS.

S.N.G.N. Romgaz S.A. is a Romanian public company engaged in the exploration, production, storage, and distribution of natural gas. Romgaz is involved in geological exploration, well interventions, workovers, and special operations, and is a member of the European gas industry. The company also operates as a provider of business solutions, customs clearance, and electronic signature services. Brock Services, LLC, known as Brock Group, is an American company engaged in providing multi-craft specialty services for industrial and commercial sectors. The company offers services such as scaffold material rental, shop facilities, field services, project management, construction, maintenance, turnaround projects, and specialized services including scaffolding, insulation, painting, abatement, fireproofing, shoring, facilities maintenance, fabrication, general mechanical services, technical services, and safety services. Grouper Technology Limited, known as BambooHR, is an Irish software company engaged in providing HR management software solutions. BambooHR also operates as a provider of applicant tracking systems, electronic signatures, and a mobile app for onboarding and offboarding, and is SOC II certified.

Virtualia is a French software company specialized in human resources management solutions for the public sector. SESAME LABS, S.L., DBA Sesame HR, is a Spanish company specialized in providing human resources software solutions. Zellis UK Limited is a British company that develops and provides AI-enabled HR, workforce management, and payroll software and services. TrueFoundry's platform automates parts of the ML pipeline, including model training, deployment, monitoring, and sharing, and integrates with CI/CD pipelines and various deployment models such as serverless and cron jobs. description: Winergy Finland is a Finnish private company specialized in machinery, with a focus on wind turbine components such as gearboxes, generators, and HybridDrives. The company supplies products for onshore and offshore wind turbines to wind turbine manufacturers and wind park owners worldwide. In addition to manufacturing and supplying wind turbine components, Winergy Finland provides consultancy, expert services, training, and remote condition management systems, as well as wind gear overhaul and maintenance, and management consulting related to renewable energy technology and wind power. The company operates production and service sites in Germany, Serbia, Turkey, China, India, and the United States.

primary_naics.label: Turbine and Turbine Generator Set Units Manufacturing

description: Pellbin Turbine is a Swedish renewable energy technology company specialized in ocean and tidal current energy production. The company develops turbine concepts designed to convert the forces of ocean and tidal currents into electricity, with an emphasis on sustainable and efficient energy solutions for countries seeking to reduce their reliance on fossil fuels and address climate change.
core_offerings: Ocean and Tidal Current Turbine Engineering
Ocean and Tidal Energy Production Solutions

primary_naics.label: All Other Miscellaneous Electrical Equipment and Component Manufacturing

description: Sunnytek Solar Sweden AB, DBA Sunnytek, is a Swedish company specialized in solar, wind, and thermal energy technologies. The company provides products and solutions for energy storage, lighting, and security, serving both residential and commercial markets globally. Sunnytek also operates in the laser optronics sector and is registered with Grön Teknik for modern energy technology management. Its operations include offices in the Nordic region, Africa, South America, and Asia.

primary_naics.label: Turbine and Turbine Generator Set Units Manufacturing

description: Fallorka is an Icelandic company specialized in the production and sale of renewable energy products, with a focus on wind turbines and sustainable energy solutions. The company operates as both a manufacturer and service provider in the renewable energy sector, serving individual consumers and businesses nationwide in Iceland. Fallorka also engages in renewable energy projects and supports sustainable development initiatives.

primary_naics.label: Turbine and Turbine Generator Set Units Manufacturing

description: Sol Industries is a Norwegian company specialized in the development and manufacturing of T-Vawt Micro Wind Turbines for the renewable energy sector. The company provides compact, scalable wind energy solutions designed for installation in urban and diverse locations, with a focus on energy efficiency, sustainability, and cost-effectiveness. Sol Industries also offers a software platform for workflow optimization and monitoring, supporting satellite connectivity for remote management.
core_offerings: Wind Turbine Maintenance and Monitoring Services

primary_naics.label: Turbine and Turbine Generator Set Units Manufacturing

description: Erikshester Vindpark AB, DBA Erikshester Vindpark, is a Swedish company specialized in the production and operation of wind turbines and renewable energy solutions. The company primarily serves industrial clients and the renewable energy sector in local and regional markets.

primary_naics.label: All Other Miscellaneous Electrical Equipment and Component Manufacturing

description: Ecopwr is a Swedish company specialized in sustainable energy solutions, focusing on products such as solar panels, power stations, solar generators, golf vehicles, spare batteries, and golf carts designed for outdoor activities, emergencies, and daily energy needs. The company emphasizes environmentally friendly and energy-efficient products with solar charging capabilities and silent operation. Ecopwr serves customers in multiple languages, including English, Swedish, German, Norwegian, and Finnish.

DEIF A/S is a Danish private company engaged in the design, manufacturing, and distribution of power control and energy management solutions for decentralized power generation, marine, and offshore applications. The company develops and supplies products such as power management controllers, PLCs, protection relays, power converters, bridge instruments, switchboard equipment, and energy management systems. DEIF also provides turnkey backup power systems for hospitals and hybrid power solutions that integrate renewables. In addition to its core manufacturing and distribution activities, DEIF offers training and education through the DEIF Academy to support customers in adopting sustainable energy solutions. The company is certified for MED approval and IACS UR E27 certification.
core_offerings: Marine and Offshore Power Control Solutions

primary_naics.label: Turbine and Turbine Generator Set Units Manufacturing

description: Logic-Energy ApS is a Danish company engaged in the design and production of small wind turbines, with a focus on renewable energy solutions. The company serves both residential and commercial customers globally, emphasizing sustainability and energy efficiency in its operations.

Walmart Stores, Inc. is an American retail corporation engaged in the operation of hypermarkets, discount department stores, grocery stores, and online retail platforms. The company offers a broad range of consumer goods, including groceries, home goods, electronics, health and wellness products, automotive supplies, pet supplies, and school and office supplies. Walmart also provides business retail services, such as Walmart Business, and operates Sam's Club retail warehouses. The company is involved in logistics, transportation, and information technology, and is certified for sustainability initiatives.

Dell Inc., known as Dell Technologies, is an American technology company engaged in the development, manufacturing, and distribution of personal computers, servers, data storage devices, network switches, software, computer peripherals, and related products. The company also provides IT services, including professional and lifecycle support, and operates in the cloud computing and online retailing sectors. Dell Technologies serves enterprise and individual customers across industries such as energy, healthcare, education, retail, telecommunications, utilities, and smart cities, with a global presence in the United States, Europe, Asia, and other regions.

The Home Depot, Inc. is an American multinational home improvement retail corporation engaged in the sale of home improvement products and services. The company operates a network of big-box stores and e-commerce platforms, offering a broad range of products such as appliances, building materials, home décor, and tools, as well as providing home services including flooring installation, bathroom remodeling, and smart home installations. The Home Depot also operates as a contractor supply provider and maintains a distribution network through Interline Brands, serving customers in the United States, Canada, and Mexico.

US Foods, Inc. is an American food distribution company that supplies food products, culinary equipment, and digital tools to restaurants, healthcare facilities, hospitality establishments, educational institutions, and other foodservice operators. The company operates production facilities and butchery operations, and provides menu development, distribution logistics, imports, specialty foods, menu cost optimization, and food safety services. US Foods also offers e-commerce and business solutions, including digital platforms and business tools, and is involved in exclusive brand development and responsible sourcing.

Decathlon SE, DBA Decathlon, is a French company specialized in the retail of sporting goods, including clothing, sports equipment, and sportswear. The company operates a global network of stores and manages the research, design, production, logistics, and distribution of its products in-house. Decathlon also develops its own brands and collaborates with pro athletes and industry partners in its design centers and R&D labs. The company is committed to sustainability and has implemented initiatives to reduce its environmental footprint.

F21 IPCO, LLC, known as Forever 21, is an American retail company engaged in fast-fashion apparel and accessories for women, men, plus-size, and children. The company operates a direct-to-consumer business model, offering a broad range of fashion products, including clothing, shoes, accessories, and beauty items, through both physical outlets and an online platform. Forever 21 serves a diverse customer base and is part of the apparel industry.

Gillette Company LLC is an American company engaged in the manufacturing and distribution of men's grooming products, including razors, blades, beard trimmers, and intimate shaving products. The company also operates a subscription-based service for product delivery and offers personalized razor handles. Gillette serves both individual consumers and businesses in multiple countries, with a focus on sustainability through the use of eco-friendly materials and waste reduction initiatives.

primary_naics.label: Supermarkets and Other Grocery Retailers (except Convenience Retailers)

description: Coles Supermarkets Australia Pty Ltd is an Australian retail company that operates a network of supermarkets and convenience stores, offering a broad range of grocery and household products. The company also provides financial services, including personal loans, credit cards, and insurance products, and manages a supply chain for its retail operations. Coles is involved in store development, retail marketing, buying, and customer insights, and integrates technology and information technology to support its retail activities. The company is certified for sustainability and ethical sourcing.

primary_naics.label: Supermarkets and Other Grocery Retailers (except Convenience Retailers)

description: Hy-Vee, Inc. is an American retail company that operates a chain of supermarkets and convenience stores. The company offers grocery shopping, online ordering, and delivery services, and provides additional retail functions such as bakeries, delicatessens, florist departments, pharmacies, wine and spirits, health clinics, fitness centers, and full-service restaurants. Hy-Vee also manages fuel stations with convenience stores, car washes, and offers food service options including salad bars and drive-in theatres. The company serves individual customers and businesses across multiple states in the Midwest and Southern United States.
core_offerings: Fitness Center and Drive-In Theatre Retail
Car Wash and Convenience Store Retail

description: Kerry Group plc, DBA DaVinci Gourmet, is an Irish beverage company specialized in the production and distribution of syrups, sauces, smoothies, beverage mixes, specialty coffees, craft cocktails, mocktails, refreshers, lemonades, energy drink infusions, and seasonal beverages. The company serves both professional and individual consumers, with a significant presence in the United States and Europe. DaVinci Gourmet also engages in sustainability and social responsibility initiatives, including support for women coffee producers.

primary_naics.label: Cut and Sew Apparel Manufacturing (except Contractors)

description: Christian Dior SE is a French multinational luxury goods company engaged in the design, production, and distribution of fashion and beauty products. The company operates in the luxury goods industry, offering a range of products including handbags, ready-to-wear, jewelry, watches, haute couture, fragrances, makeup, skincare, and home goods. Dior also manages a global network of boutiques and spas, including Dior Spa, which provides luxury wellness retreats and services. The company serves both individual consumers and businesses in multiple regions, including Europe, North America, South America, the Middle East, and Asia Pacific. Dior is publicly traded on Euronext Paris and is part of the CAC All-Share index.
core_offerings: Makeup and Skincare Product Development and Production
Perfume and Fragrance Development and Production
Luxury Fashion Product Design and Manufacturing

description: M.H. Alshaya Co. W.L.L., known as H&M Home, is a Kuwaiti company engaged in the design, production, and retail of home goods, including clothing, home decor, beauty products, and home furniture. The company operates primarily in the UAE, Egypt, and Saudi Arabia, serving a diverse customer base that includes women, men, children, and families. H&M Home also manages an online shopping platform and is part of the H&M Group, which is committed to sustainability and social responsibility.

Avery Products Corporation is an American manufacturing company engaged in the production and supply of self-adhesive labels, labeling software, binders, dividers, and other office supplies. The company serves businesses, individual consumers, and educational institutions, offering products such as blank and custom labels, cards, tags, and related organizational items. Avery also provides digital design tools and templates for its products. The company operates internationally and is part of CCL Industries Inc.

Nestlé Korea Co., Ltd., known as Nespresso, is a Swiss company engaged in the design, manufacturing, and distribution of espresso and coffee machines, coffee capsules, and coffee accessories. The company serves both individual consumers and business clients, including corporate cafés, hotels, restaurants, and fine dining establishments, offering professional coffee solutions and subscription services. Nespresso operates a network of boutiques and points of sale, and is B-Corp certified. The company also participates in capsule recycling programs and emphasizes sustainability in its operations.

primary_naics.label: Plumbing Fixture Fitting and Trim Manufacturing

description: Kohler New Zealand Limited is a New Zealand company engaged in the manufacturing and retail of plumbing products and cabinetry. The company operates as a bathroom supply store and general store, offering a range of products such as baths, toilets, tapware, basins, furniture, and accessories for both residential and commercial markets. Kohler also provides technical support and warranty services, and is part of the Kohler Kitchen and Bath Group, which includes a portfolio of brands and products.

Coop Home Goods, LLC, known as Coop Sleep Goods, is an American company engaged in the design, manufacturing, and retail of adjustable and memory foam sleep products, including pillows, sheets, comforters, mattress toppers, and bedding accessories. The company also operates as a bedding and home goods store, serving individuals, families, and healthcare providers. Coop Sleep Goods incorporates eco-friendly materials and cooling technologies in its products and maintains an e-commerce platform.
core_offerings: Sleep Product Promotions and Newsletter Services

primary_naics.label: Motor Vehicle Gasoline Engine and Engine Parts Manufacturing

description: FCE Bank plc, known as Ford Credit, is a British financial services company engaged in automotive financing, leasing, insurance, and vehicle maintenance. The company serves both individual and business customers, including commercial vehicle customers, across the United Kingdom. In addition to its financial services, Ford Credit operates a network of dealers and service centers, providing vehicle sales, maintenance, and related support. The company is part of the Ford Motor Company and is authorized by the Prudential Regulation Authority and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority.

TRU Kids, Inc., DBA Toys"R"Us, is an American retail company specialized in toys, dolls, action figures, learning games, building blocks, and related children's products. The company serves a global market, focusing on children and families, and operates both physical stores and an online platform. Toys"R"Us also provides DIY activities, toy reviews, and printable content to engage customers.
core_offerings: Toy Review and Product Evaluation Services
DIY Activities and Educational Content Services

description: Harbor Freight is an American retailer engaged in tools and equipment, operating a chain of retail stores and an e-commerce platform. The company offers a broad range of products including automotive, air and power tools, storage, outdoor power equipment, generators, welding supplies, shop equipment, and hand tools. Harbor Freight also provides extended service protection plans, replacement parts, and a credit card program, and is involved in community initiatives supporting schools and trades programs.
core_offerings: Tool and Equipment Quality Assurance Services

description: Goya Foods, Inc. is an American food company engaged in the production and distribution of Hispanic and Latin American foods and beverages. The company operates manufacturing and distribution facilities in the United States, Puerto Rico, the Dominican Republic, and Spain, supplying products such as beans, rice, seasonings, snacks, beverages, and frozen ingredients to both Hispanic and mainstream markets. Goya Foods also manages a webstore and distributes its products through national club stores. The company is certified for sustainability and environmental responsibility, including the use of solar energy and the preservation of traditional crops and harvesting practices.

Aurelo Eclat, known as Aurelo Packaging Co, is an Australian company engaged in eco-friendly skincare and beauty packaging, including sustainable glass dropper bottles, caps, and packaging for serums, face oils, and cosmetics. The company serves individuals, small brands, creatives, and businesses, offering locally available packaging solutions with a focus on sustainability.

Yiwu Yijie Packaging Products Co., Ltd. is a Chinese trading company engaged in the manufacturing and supply of packaging products, including plastic, glass, and paper-based packaging solutions. The company serves a global market, focusing on industries such as cosmetics, personal care, and consumer goods. Yijie Packaging operates primarily as a wholesale supplier and is certified by Alibaba.com.

Shenzhen Itop Cosmetic Packaging Co., Ltd. is a Chinese manufacturing company engaged in cosmetic packaging solutions. The company serves a global market, focusing on the cosmetics industry and providing customized packaging products such as bottles, jars, tubes, and accessories.

Bodis, LLC is a United States company specialized in the production and distribution of beauty cosmetics and cosmetic packaging. The company primarily serves wholesale clients in the United States, offering products and packaging solutions for both business and individual customers.

Standard Mold.net, Inc. is a South Korean company engaged in the manufacturing and supply of cosmetic packaging and containers for the cosmetics industry. The company serves both domestic and international markets, offering a range of products including applicators, ceramic balls, make-up tubes, sunstick bottles, jars, and other cosmetic packaging items.

Flextribe is a company engaged in eco-friendly honeycomb packing paper and reusable packaging solutions for fragile items such as electronics, home décor, and accessories. The company emphasizes sustainability by using eco-friendly materials and promoting reusable packaging options to reduce the carbon footprint. Flextribe serves a global market, including the cosmetics, photo, and home décor industries, and operates through a direct-to-consumer e-commerce platform.

Tata Consultancy Services Limited is an Indian multinational technology company that provides information technology consulting, outsourcing, and software services. The company delivers solutions in areas such as digital transformation, cloud computing, cybersecurity, and Internet of Things, and offers business solutions and specialized technologies. Tata Consultancy Services serves clients in sectors including banking, capital markets, consumer packaged goods, communications, education, energy, healthcare, high technology, insurance, life sciences, manufacturing, public services, retail, travel and logistics, and public sector organizations. The company operates internationally with a global presence and is publicly traded on the National Stock Exchange and Bombay Stock Exchange.

Capgemini Canada Inc. is a Canadian management and IT consulting company engaged in providing services across applications, consulting, infrastructure, financials, business processing, operational technology, engineering, workforce strategies, and technology projects. The company serves a wide range of industries, including utilities, banking, insurance, consumer products, retail, manufacturing, automotive, public sector, and hospitality, with operations across Canada and a global network of offices and delivery centers. Capgemini is also involved in sustainability initiatives, supporting the UN Sustainable Development Goals, and is committed to Indigenous relations and digital inclusion.

Wipro Limited is an Indian multinational technology company engaged in information technology, consulting, and business process services. The company provides services in areas such as cloud computing, cybersecurity, data analytics, digital transformation, artificial intelligence, robotics, and engineering. Wipro serves clients across sectors including banking, financial services, telecommunications, media and information services, consumer goods, education, public sector, retail, travel, energy, manufacturing, aerospace, automotive, industrial manufacturing, natural resources, oil and gas, utilities, healthcare, life sciences, medical devices, technology products and services, and consumer electronics. The company operates globally, with a presence in major markets across the Americas, Asia Pacific, Africa, Europe, Middle East, and India.

NTT DATA Group Corporation is a Japanese multinational information technology service and consulting company engaged in IT consulting, business process services, IT modernization, and managed services. The company serves a wide range of industries, including automotive, banking, education, energy, healthcare, insurance, life sciences, manufacturing, retail, telecommunications, media, technology, and travel. NTT DATA also provides cloud solutions, cybersecurity, data and artificial intelligence, digital workplace solutions, edge computing, enterprise application platforms, generative AI, global data centers, network services, and sustainability services. The company operates internationally and is part of the NTT Group.

Fujitsu Limited is a Japanese multinational corporation engaged in information and communications technology (ICT) equipment and services. The company provides IT services and solutions, including business and digital transformation, network and security services, IT and infrastructure operations, hybrid IT and cloud services, and consulting. Fujitsu serves a wide range of industries, including manufacturing, mobility and transportation, retail, public sector, finance, healthcare, and resources and energy. The company also operates in telecommunications, computer hardware, consumer electronics, software, data storage, cloud computing, and semiconductors. Fujitsu is publicly traded on the Tokyo Stock Exchange and is part of the Furukawa Group.

Telefónica Innovación Digital, S.L.U., known as Telefónica Venture Builder, is a Spanish company that operates as a venture builder and digital innovation provider. The company supports the development of digital business ideas and startups, offering services such as ideation, business plan development, and post-creation monitoring. Telefónica Venture Builder also engages in the creation of new companies based on digital technologies and collaborates with startups in sectors including financial services, e-commerce, media, entertainment, and logistics. Additionally, the company is involved in initiatives such as the Open Gateway project, which provides standardized APIs for telecommunications networks, and the CAMARA project, which aims to standardize network APIs across the industry.
core_offerings: Pay TV and ITC Services Distribution

description: CGI Inc. is a Canadian multinational information technology consulting and software development company. The company provides business consulting, systems integration, managed IT services, application services, infrastructure services, business process management, and intellectual property solutions. CGI also offers professional training and coaching, and is involved in the development of IoT applications, cloud computing, and application development testing and maintenance. The company serves clients in sectors such as banking, communications, government, healthcare, insurance, life sciences, manufacturing, oil and gas, retail, transportation, utilities, aerospace, maritime, media, housing, construction, and space, with operations in over 40 countries.

Leidos, Inc. is an American company that operates as a systems integrator, engineering firm, and information technology services provider. The company delivers solutions in national security, health, defense, energy, government, and space sectors, with activities including systems integration, engineering, and IT services. Leidos also provides digital modernization, cybersecurity, and enterprise software solutions, as well as cloud and artificial intelligence services. Its operations serve both civilian and defense agencies, as well as commercial markets, and the company holds government-wide acquisition, indefinite delivery, and blanket purchase agreement contract vehicles.
core_offerings: Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning Services

description: Booz Allen Hamilton Inc. is an American company that provides management and technology consulting, cybersecurity services, digital transformation solutions, and artificial intelligence and cloud computing services. The company also offers software development, mission readiness support, and professional training and coaching. Booz Allen serves government agencies, commercial enterprises, international organizations, and nonprofits, with operations in the United States, Southeast Asia, and Europe. The company is publicly traded and is a component of the Russell 1000 index.

Science Applications International Corporation, Inc., known as SAIC, is an American technology company that provides mission integration, information technology services, engineering, and professional services for federal civilian, state and local, defense, intelligence community, and space sectors. The company delivers solutions in areas such as mission IT, enterprise IT, cybersecurity, cloud services, and artificial intelligence-driven tools. SAIC operates internationally, with offices in the United States, Australia, Canada, and other countries.
core_offerings: Federal and State IT Solutions Development

description: Tietoevry Oyj is a Finnish company engaged in software development, digital engineering, and IT consulting. The company provides services in cloud solutions, data-driven business transformation, intelligent automation, user experience services, cybersecurity, and AI-powered solutions. Tietoevry serves a broad range of industries, including automotive, financial services, healthcare, education, energy, manufacturing, public sector, pulp, paper, and packaging, as well as fintech and telecom sectors. The company operates internationally, with offices in Finland, Norway, Sweden, Denmark, Estonia, France, Germany, India, and the United States.

ASGN Incorporated is an American information technology services company that provides IT consulting, professional staffing, and enterprise software solutions for commercial and government clients. The company operates through two main segments: Apex Systems, which delivers technology and creative digital marketing services, and ECS, which provides mission-critical IT services to government agencies. ASGN also offers management consulting, professional training and coaching, and digital services, including data and analytics, artificial intelligence and machine learning, and cloud solutions. The company serves a broad range of industries, including financial services, healthcare, technology, media, telecommunications, business and government services, and defense, and maintains operations in North America, Mexico, Canada, and Latin America.

CACI International Inc is an American multinational company that provides professional services and information technology solutions for national security, government, and private sector clients. The company operates in consulting, defense, information technology, and outsourcing, offering services such as enterprise IT, mission and engineering support, space and spectrum superiority, cyber and digital solutions, and government property management. CACI also delivers business intelligence and software development, including enterprise and business systems, and supports its operations with a corporate service management system, virtual university, and related tools and platforms. The company is publicly traded on the New York Stock Exchange and is certified for sustainability and corporate social responsibility.

Sili Energy Co., Ltd. (주식회사 시리에너지) is a South Korean company engaged in the development and manufacturing of secondary battery cathode materials, including silicon and lithium-based cathode materials, and solid-state battery materials. The company operates as both a manufacturer and service provider in the energy and battery technology industry, with a focus on the automotive sector, particularly electric vehicles. Sili Energy also provides material evaluation and technical consulting services, and is involved in lithium recycling and cost reduction initiatives. The company maintains a dedicated R&D campus and laboratory.

RUSTOR LLC (ООО «РУСТОР») is a Russian company engaged in the development and production of cathode materials based on complex oxides of lithium, nickel, manganese, and cobalt for lithium-ion battery applications. The company also conducts research and development in the lithium-ion battery industry and serves as both a manufacturer and supplier of cathode materials to the lithium-ion battery manufacturing sector, primarily targeting clients in the energy storage market.
core_offerings: Custom Lithium-Ion Battery Cathode Material Development
Lithium-Ion Battery Cathode Material Sales and Distribution
Lithium-Ion Battery Cathode Material Research and Development

description: Li Hongte New Energy Materials Co., Ltd. (陕西力宏特新能源材料有限公司), DBA Li Hongte (力宏特), is a Chinese company specialized in the research, development, production, and sales of lithium-ion battery cathode materials, with a focus on lithium iron phosphate (LFP) and ternary materials. The company primarily serves the energy storage and electric vehicle industries, supplying lithium iron phosphate cathode materials for battery manufacturing. It also operates a research institute and technical department dedicated to developing new technologies, processes, and materials, and maintains a quality control system for process data tracking and early warning systems for battery batches.
core_offerings: Lithium Iron Phosphate Cathode Material Manufacturing
Lithium-Ion Battery Cathode Material Research and Development
Lithium-Ion Battery Cathode Material Sales and Distribution

(湖南裕能新能源电池材料股份有限公司), DBA Hunan Yueneng New Energy Battery Material Co., Ltd., is a Chinese company specialized in the research, production, and sales of lithium-ion battery cathode materials, with a primary focus on lithium iron phosphate (LFP) and ternary materials. The company supplies its products to the automotive and energy storage sectors, serving battery manufacturers. It also operates a research and development institute and technical department dedicated to developing new technologies, processes, and materials.
core_offerings: Lithium-Ion Battery Cathode Material Research and Development
New Energy Vehicle Battery Material Supply

description: CIDEcell is a Spanish manufacturer specialized in the production of customized electrodes and cells for lithium-ion batteries, solid-state batteries, sodium-ion batteries, lithium-sulphur batteries, and ultracapacitors. The company serves industries such as aerospace, medical devices, renewable energy, defense, electric vehicles, marine, and related sectors. CIDEcell also operates as a provider of material manufacturing, OEM manufacturing, and battery manufacturing services, and maintains research and development laboratories for materials and characterization. The company emphasizes sustainability through the use of environmentally conscious materials and processes.

Shanshan New Material (Finland) Oy, known as Shanshan Technology, is a Finnish company engaged in the manufacturing and supply of lithium battery anode materials. The company operates a European production base in Vaasa, Finland, serving the European market with a focus on sustainable and eco-friendly production practices. Its operations include research and development activities related to lithium battery anode materials.
core_offerings: Lithium Battery Anode Materials Research and Development

description: ReFire_ev is an Indian company operating in the oil and energy sector, specializing in the development and supply of electric vehicle charging infrastructure and lithium ion battery technology. The company also provides electrical vehicle chargers and EV lithium ion batteries along with their accessories.

L'Essinganaise is a French company specialized in the manufacturing and online sale of prepared and cooked African dishes, including traditional African cuisine, soups, and beverages. The company operates as both a food manufacturer and a service provider in the food industry, focusing on authentic African cuisine. L'Essinganaise serves customers across France and emphasizes traditional African recipes prepared with exotic and ethnic spices sourced directly from Africa, using organic ingredients and aseptic processing.
Paniers d'Eve is a French food manufacturer operating in crop growing, fruit and vegetable processing, and truck farming.

Société Coopérative d’Intérêt Collectif (SCIC), DBA LA MULTILOCALE, is a French cooperative society specialized in regenerative agriculture, food processing, and the promotion of a circular economy. The organization focuses on hyperlocal and local food production, supports local entrepreneurship, and collaborates with enterprises, local authorities, associations, consumers, and training organizations to develop multi-actor territorial projects. LA MULTILOCALE also operates as a business-to-business service provider, supplying food products and offering a platform for entrepreneurs and community members to participate in its initiatives.

Domaine Godeau is a French beverage manufacturer and wine producer operating in the food production sector. The company is based in Beaulieu-sur-Layon, Pays de la Loire, France, and specializes in the manufacturing of beverages and food products.
Famille Pouille is a French company specialized in the manufacturing and production of food and beverage products. The company operates primarily in the food and beverage sector.
MILHADE Vins & Spiritueux is a French beverage manufacturer operating in the food production sector. The company serves vignerons, distributors, and clients in the Nouvelle-Aquitaine region.

AUDEBERT BOISSONS Société par actions simplifiée, DBA Auvergnat Cola, is a French beverage manufacturer and distributor specialized in the production and distribution of regional beverages, with a primary focus on the Auvergne region. The company offers a range of soft drinks, including cola, lemonade, and tonic, made with locally sourced ingredients and traditional production methods. Auvergnat Cola also operates in bottling and packaging, with an emphasis on sustainability and eco-friendly practices.

INOU is a French company engaged in the production and sale of fruits, with a focus on pressing and processing these fruits into various products. The company operates in Paris and serves the French market.

Geyer is a French beverage manufacturer specializing in food production, with a focus on the beverage sector. The company produces a variety of drinks, including artisanal lemonade, energy drinks, beers, and a malt-based beverage, and distributes its products through large retailers, convenience stores, and impulse channels. Geyer emphasizes its Made in France heritage.

Kermené is a French company specialized in the production and distribution of butcher and charcuterie products for the food and beverage sector. The company operates industrial production and logistics sites, supplying fresh meat and charcuterie products to E.Leclerc stores across the Côtes-d'Armor region and Brittany. Kermené also manages logistics platforms and is involved in food manufacturing, with a focus on sustainability and environmental protection.
core_offerings: Environmental Protection Services for Food Production
Risk Prevention Services for Food Production

description: Elixia is a French manufacturer and distributor specialized in the production of organic limonades made from agave syrup, targeting health-conscious consumers. The company emphasizes sustainability and organic agricultural practices, sourcing ingredients from the Jurassian massif and offering products with low glycemic index and low calorie content. Elixia's offerings are available through its official website and direct contact channels.

Dechelette Estate is a French beverage manufacturer and food producer operating in the food production sector. The company specializes in winemaking, aging, bottling, and distribution management, serving the wine and food industry. It operates in the most prestigious terroirs of France.

description: KVA Wind Int. ApS, DBA KVA Wind, is a Danish company specialized in the production and installation of residential wind turbines and the provision of renewable energy solutions. The company primarily serves the Danish market, offering services such as turbine placement consultation, energy production calculations, and noise compliance assessments. KVA Wind also provides maintenance and service for various types of residential wind turbines, including Vestas, KVA Vind, and DTU Vindenergi models, and is approved by the Danish Energy Agency's Approval Committee for turbine maintenance. Additionally, the company offers generator installations through its subsidiary, KVA-Diesel.dk.

David Nyren is a Swedish company specialized in the production and installation of solar panels, as well as the provision of educational services related to renewable energy. The company serves both residential and commercial clients, including those in the construction sector, and operates a solar panel production facility. It also offers educational services for individuals interested in renewable energy solutions.

primary_naics.label: Turbine and Turbine Generator Set Units Manufacturing

description: Enercon is a Swedish wind turbine builder operating in the renewable energy sector, specializing in the construction of wind turbines.

Sola Markis & Persienn Ab is a Swedish company engaged in the production and sale of solar panels and related products, with a focus on renewable energy solutions. The company operates as both a manufacturer and distributor, serving individual and business customers interested in solar energy. It is also active as a store, offering solar energy products to customers in Sweden.

Kraftkar Energi AS, DBA Kraftkar Energi, is a Norwegian company specialized in renewable energy solutions, with a focus on solar energy. The company provides solar energy products and services, including outdoor solar panels, building-integrated photovoltaics, and free-standing solar panels, serving residential, industrial, commercial, and off-grid energy needs. Kraftkar Energi also operates as a supplier of green energy and offers installation and maintenance services for solar panels, as well as after-sales support and building-integrated solutions. The company is part of the Med enerett group, which is involved in renewable energy projects and initiatives.

Lundeseter Solcellepark is a Norwegian business entity specialized in the development and production of solar panels, operating as a service provider in the renewable energy sector with a focus on solar energy projects. The company targets renewable energy consumers and environmental stakeholders, and is engaged in sustainable development and community support initiatives.

primary_naics.label: Turbine and Turbine Generator Set Units Manufacturing

description: Rögle Vindkraftpark is a Swedish company operating in the solar energy sector, functioning as both a supplier of solar energy equipment and a builder of wind turbines.

primary_naics.label: Turbine and Turbine Generator Set Units Manufacturing

description: Sol Industries is a Norwegian company specialized in the development and manufacturing of T-Vawt Micro Wind Turbines for the renewable energy sector. The company provides compact, scalable wind energy solutions designed for installation in urban and diverse locations, with a focus on energy efficiency, sustainability, and cost-effectiveness. Sol Industries also offers a software platform for workflow optimization and monitoring, supporting satellite connectivity for remote management.
core_offerings: Wind Turbine Maintenance and Monitoring Services

primary_naics.label: Turbine and Turbine Generator Set Units Manufacturing

description: DEIF A/S, DBA DEIF Wind Power Technology, is a Danish company specialized in control solutions for decentralized power production, marine and offshore applications, and wind turbines. The company operates as a global supplier, providing turbine components, retrofit solutions, wind park control technology, and pitch control systems for both new and existing turbines. DEIF Wind Power Technology serves clients in the renewable energy sector, with headquarters in Skive, Denmark.

Sembakken is a Danish company engaged in the production and installation of solar energy systems, including photovoltaic panels and solar energy solutions, with a focus on renewable energy solutions. The company primarily serves residential and commercial clients in Denmark.
core_offerings: Solar Power System Design and Implementation
Solar Energy System Production and Installation

description: Carita och Torbjörn is a Swedish company specialized in the production and sale of wind power equipment and related services. The company operates a wind power park in Kronoberget, serving customers interested in renewable energy solutions.

Bluetec Vest AS is a Norwegian company engaged in the manufacturing of solar panel systems and renewable energy solutions, with a focus on solar energy. The company serves private individuals and businesses in the Vestland region of Norway, providing products such as solar cell panels, inverters, and fixed equipment, as well as energy consulting and implementation services. BlueTec Vest also undertakes solar installation projects for private individuals and agricultural farms, with an emphasis on sustainability and climate goals aligned with EU targets.

primary_naics.label: Electrical Apparatus and Equipment, Wiring Supplies, and Related Equipment Merchant Wholesalers

description: Home Energy AB, DBA Home Energy, is a Swedish company specialized in the production and supply of small-scale renewable energy products, including solar, wind, and bioenergy solutions. The company serves industrial properties and businesses seeking sustainable energy solutions in Sweden. Home Energy also operates as a service provider for the maintenance and support of its renewable energy products.
core_offerings: Combined Solar and Wind System Development

primary_naics.label: Turbine and Turbine Generator Set Units Manufacturing

description: Tesla Ocean Turbine is a Swedish renewable energy company specialized in the development and deployment of tidal energy harvesting systems. The company focuses on providing solutions for renewable energy investors and stakeholders seeking cost-effective and scalable tidal energy systems. Its operations include project development and deployment of tidal energy technologies, with a particular emphasis on cost reduction and environmental impact reduction.

ENERCON is a Swedish company operating in the renewable energy sector, specializing in wind electric power generation and related services. The company is active in environmental services and the renewables & environment domain, with production facilities on three continents and market representation in more than 40 countries. ENERCON is committed to sustainability.

Folksol Stockholm AB, DBA Folksol, is a Swedish company specialized in solar energy solutions, focusing on solar panels, smart batteries, and off-grid energy systems. The company operates as both a service provider and product manufacturer in the renewable energy sector, serving residential and off-grid energy consumers primarily in Sweden. Folksol emphasizes sustainability and energy efficiency in its operations.

Lonza Group Ltd is a Swiss contract development and manufacturing organization that provides integrated solutions for the healthcare industry, including biologics, small molecules, and specialized modalities. The company operates across three business platforms—Integrated Biologics, Advanced Synthesis, and Specialized Modalities—offering services such as custom manufacturing, product development, and detection systems for the pharmaceutical and biotechnology sectors. Lonza serves clients in Europe, North America, and Asia, and is publicly traded on the SIX Swiss Exchange and the SGX Singapore Exchange.

Octapharma AG is a Swiss pharmaceutical company engaged in the development, manufacturing, and distribution of human protein-based therapies. The company operates research and development, manufacturing, and plasma donation center facilities, and manages a global supply chain and logistics network to support its international operations. Octapharma serves patients in 120 countries, with a focus on therapeutic areas such as haematology, immunotherapy, and critical care.
core_offerings: Coagulopathy and Bleeding Disorder Medicine Manufacturing

description: Ferring International Center S.A. is a Swiss biopharmaceutical company engaged in the research, development, and manufacturing of pharmaceutical products and therapies for reproductive medicine, maternal health, gastroenterology, urology, and microbiome research. The company also operates as a pharmaceutical manufacturer and provides clinical research services. Ferring serves markets in over 100 countries and maintains a global presence with offices and manufacturing sites in Europe, the United States, Asia, and South America.

Galderma S.A. is a Swiss pharmaceutical company engaged in the development, manufacturing, and distribution of dermatological treatments and skin care products. The company operates in the dermatology and pharmaceutical sectors, providing injectable aesthetics, dermatological skincare, and therapeutic dermatology solutions. Galderma serves healthcare professionals and consumers globally, with operations in multiple countries and a network of subsidiaries and affiliates. The company is publicly traded on the SIX Swiss Exchange.

Lonza Group Ltd, known as Lonza Capsules & Health Ingredients, is a Swiss pharmaceutical and nutraceutical company engaged in capsule design, manufacturing, and encapsulation technology. The company provides products such as hard empty capsules, encapsulation equipment, and specialty health ingredients, serving customers in the pharmaceutical and nutraceutical industries worldwide. Lonza Capsules & Health Ingredients also offers technical and regulatory support, as well as manufacturing and technical services related to capsule design and encapsulation.

Siegfried AG is a Swiss contract development and manufacturing organization engaged in the production of active pharmaceutical ingredients, intermediates, and finished dosage forms. The company provides services including process development, optimization, registration, production, packaging, and logistics for pharmaceutical and chemical clients. Siegfried operates multiple production sites in Switzerland, Germany, Spain, France, Malta, the USA, and China, and is ISO certified. The company also engages in research and development activities and is a member of the Dow Jones Sustainability Index Europe.

IBSA Institut Biochimique SA is a Swiss pharmaceutical company engaged in the production of therapeutic products, including prescription drugs, over-the-counter medicines, medical devices, and food supplements. The company serves healthcare professionals and the pharmaceutical industry globally, with a focus on areas such as reproductive medicine, endocrinology, pain and inflammation, osteoarticular diseases, aesthetic medicine, dermatology, uro-gynaecology, cardiometabolic diseases, and respiratory diseases. IBSA also engages in licensing activities and international distribution, and is committed to sustainability through its operations and product development.

Bachem AG is a Swiss pharmaceutical company engaged in the development and manufacturing of peptides and oligonucleotides. The company provides products and services for research, clinical development, and commercial applications, including the production of biologically active peptides, amino acid derivatives, and biochemicals. Bachem also offers CMC development, peptide and oligonucleotide new chemical entity development, commercial API manufacturing, custom peptide synthesis, research-grade production, diagnostics, and cosmetics. The company operates internationally, with facilities in Switzerland, the United States, and Asia, and is certified for GMP compliance.

Alcon Pharmaceuticals Ltd. is a global pharmaceutical company engaged in ophthalmic pharmaceutical products and services, including surgical and vision care solutions. The company serves a broad market of over 260 million people in more than 140 countries, with a focus on research and development and a commitment to advancing access to eye care. Alcon also operates as a provider of ophthalmic pharmaceutical products and services, with a presence in the United States and a global commercial footprint.

CARBOGEN AMCIS AG, DBA CARBOGEN AMCIS, is a Swiss pharmaceutical company that operates as a Contract Development and Manufacturing Organization (CDMO) for the pharmaceutical and biopharmaceutical sectors. The company provides contract chemical process research and development, API supply, drug product development, and contract research and manufacturing services. It also offers specialized services such as process research, high-potency API manufacturing, clean room facilities for antibody drug conjugates, and chromatography services. CARBOGEN AMCIS serves clients globally from multiple sites in Europe and Asia.
core_offerings: Cholesterol and Vitamin D Analog Manufacturing

description: OM Pharma Ltd., DBA OM Pharma, is a Swiss biopharmaceutical company engaged in the development and commercialization of bacterial lysates and immunomodulators for the prevention and treatment of respiratory and urinary tract infections, as well as vascular diseases. The company operates internationally, distributing its products in over 100 countries and maintaining a presence in Central America. OM Pharma also conducts research and development activities, including clinical trials and collaborations with other biotech firms, and is involved in the manufacturing of microbial-derived immunotherapeutic products for immunological disorders.

MSD Merck Sharp & Dohme AG is a Swiss biopharmaceutical company engaged in the research, development, manufacturing, and commercialization of medicines and vaccines. The company operates in multiple therapeutic areas, including oncology, infectious diseases, immunology, cardio-metabolic disorders, and vaccines. MSD also provides analytical methods for new active substances and medicines, and manages a supply chain and logistics network for global distribution. The company is certified and participates in clinical trials and research activities.
